name: quickget-remote
description: Lightweight client for QNAP Download Station 5

scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist-firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename quickget-remote-$npm_package_version-firefox.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.test:e2e:mock: playwright test tests/e2e/mockNas.contract.spec.ts tests/e2e/popup.full-cycle.spec.ts tests/e2e/routing-rules.spec.ts tests/e2e/torrent-files.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:mock:headed: playwright test tests/e2e/mockNas.contract.spec.ts tests/e2e/popup.full-cycle.spec.ts tests/e2e/routing-rules.spec.ts tests/e2e/torrent-files.spec.ts --headed
scripts.release: npm run build && rm -f quickget-remote-$npm_package_version.zip && cd dist && npx bestzip ../quickget-remote-$npm_package_version.zip *
scripts.capture:store-assets: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/store-assets.spec.ts && node scripts/generate-store-assets.js

author: QuickGet Remote Contributors
